---
pagetitle: "Home"
listing:
  - id: posts-home
    contents: "posts/**/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    max-items: 4
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, title, description, date]
---

::: {.sp-hero}
::: {.sp-hero-left}
[Public Finance & Policy Analytics · Nepal]{.sp-hero-eyebrow}

# Nepal's federal money. Does it go where it's needed? {.sp-hero-headline}

I analyse Nepal's fiscal and governance data to support better public decisions — turning *administrative records governments produce but rarely interrogate* into evidence that decision-makers can act on.

[Saroj Pathak · Kathmandu]{.sp-hero-byline}

[[View blogs →]{.sp-btn-primary}](/blogs.html)  [[Interactive tools]{.sp-btn-secondary}](/tools.html)
:::

::: {.sp-hero-right}
::: {.sp-stat-card}
[4.7×]{.sp-stat-number}

gap between highest and lowest per-capita grant allocation across Nepal's 753 local governments

[FY 2083–84 · FCGO allocation data]{.sp-stat-source}
:::

::: {.sp-stat-card}
[r ≈ -0.23]{.sp-stat-number}

correlation between education conditional grant and student-teacher ratio — the formula ignores actual need

[Ministry of Education · CBS 2021]{.sp-stat-source}
:::

::: {.sp-stat-card}
[$r^2 = 0.11$]{.sp-stat-number}

population doesnt no explain budget allocation at primary care for human resources at local level

[Ministry of Health and Population · Budget Speech & Fiscal Transfer 2080–81]{.sp-stat-source}
:::
:::
:::

---

::: {.sp-section-header}
## Recent Blogpost

[All posts →](/blogs.html){.sp-view-all}
:::

::: {#posts-home}
:::

---

::: {.sp-focus}
[What I work on]{.sp-section-label}

::: {.sp-focus-grid}
::: {.sp-focus-item}
#### Public Finance & Fiscal Systems

Quantitative analysis of intergovernmental fiscal transfers, budget credibility, and subnational public finance using administrative and fiscal data to understand whether fiscal systems allocate resources equitably and achieve their stated policy objectives.
:::

::: {.sp-focus-item}
#### Human Development Analytics

Analysis of health financing, education outcomes and household welfare using survey microdata, administrative records, fiscal data to examine whether public services reach populations with greatest need.
:::

::: {.sp-focus-item}
#### Political Economy & Electoral Analytics

Constituency-level analysis of voter behaviour, political competitions, and policy incentives using electoral and demographic data to understand how politics shapes decision-making.
:::
:::
:::
